channel.title: NPR Programs: Morning Edition
channel.description: Morning Edition takes listeners around the country and the world with multi-faceted stories and commentaries every weekday. Hosts Steve Inskeep, Leila Fadel, Michel Martin and A Martínez bring you the latest breaking news and features to prepare you for the day.
channel.copyright: Copyright 2024 NPR - For Personal Use Only

item.title: UN working to rescue thousands of seafarers trapped in the Strait of Hormuz
item.description: Some 20,000 seafarers are trapped in the Persian Gulf and Strait of Hormuz; the UN says its trying to extricate them.
item.content:encoded: Some 20,000 seafarers are trapped in the Persian Gulf and Strait of Hormuz; the UN says its trying to extricate them.
item.dc:creator: Diaa Hadid

item.title: Retired rear admiral talks about Trump's address on the Iran war
item.description: NPR's Steve Inskeep asks retired Rear Admiral and former national security communications adviser John Kirby about President Trump's address on the war with Iran.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Steve Inskeep asks retired Rear Admiral and former national security communications adviser John Kirby about President Trump's address on the war with Iran.
item.dc:creator: Steve Inskeep

item.title: In address to the nation, Trump says war in Iran is 'nearing completion'
item.description: President Trump addressed the nation Wednesday night to outline his objectives for the war in Iran, discuss the military's progress to date and announce the war there is "nearing completion."
item.content:encoded: President Trump addressed the nation Wednesday night to outline his objectives for the war in Iran, discuss the military's progress to date and announce the war there is "nearing completion."
item.dc:creator: Deepa Shivaram

item.title: Trump's VA killed a home loan program. Vets are now losing their homes because of it
item.description: Foreclosures on VA loans are at their highest level in a decade. VA has a fix but it is months away and could still leave vets worse off than most other homeowners.
item.content:encoded:
Foreclosures on VA loans are at their highest level in a decade. VA has a fix but it is months away and could still leave vets worse off than most other homeowners.

(Image credit: Margaret Albaugh for NPR)
item.dc:creator: Chris Arnold

item.title: Israel invades southern Lebanon to go after Iran-allied Hezbollah militants
item.description: Israel has invaded Lebanon in pursuit of Iran-backed Hezbollah fighters in southern Lebanon. Israel has said it will push up to the Litani River.
item.content:encoded: Israel has invaded Lebanon in pursuit of Iran-backed Hezbollah fighters in southern Lebanon. Israel has said it will push up to the Litani River.
item.dc:creator: Lauren Frayer

item.title: Morning news brief
item.description: Trump says war in Iran is 'nearing completion' in national address, Iranian officials react to President Trump's speech on Iran war, SCOTUS hears arguments on birthright citizenship.
item.content:encoded: Trump says war in Iran is 'nearing completion' in national address, Iranian officials react to President Trump's speech on Iran war, SCOTUS hears arguments on birthright citizenship.
item.dc:creator: A Martínez

item.title: Singer Brandy shares her rise to stardom in new memoir, 'Phases'
item.description: NPR's A Martinez speaks with Grammy-winning artist Brandy about her memoir, "Phases," in which she charts her growth to stardom from Mississippi churches to Hollywood.
item.content:encoded: NPR's A Martinez speaks with Grammy-winning artist Brandy about her memoir, "Phases," in which she charts her growth to stardom from Mississippi churches to Hollywood.
item.dc:creator: A Martínez

item.title: Former minister of public health talks about Israel's invasion of Lebanon
item.description: NPR's Leila Fadel speaks with Dr. Firass Abiad, Lebanon's former Minister of Public Health, about Israel's invasion of his country.
item.content:encoded: NPR's Leila Fadel speaks with Dr. Firass Abiad, Lebanon's former Minister of Public Health, about Israel's invasion of his country.
item.dc:creator: Leila Fadel

item.title: Proposed Oklahoma law would make state to report non-citizens who apply for benefits
item.description: Oklahoma lawmakers say that at the urging of White House advisor Stephen Miller, they're going to require the state to report to ICE people without legal immigration status who apply for benefits like food assistance or health care - even for their eligible children.
item.content:encoded: Oklahoma lawmakers say that at the urging of White House advisor Stephen Miller, they're going to require the state to report to ICE people without legal immigration status who apply for benefits like food assistance or health care - even for their eligible children.
item.dc:creator: Lionel Ramos

item.title: Pakistan is playing intermediary in the Iran war, a role it has played before
item.description: Pakistan has emerged as a key intermediary in the U.S-Israel war with Iran. It played this role before, during a high-stakes moment in diplomatic history.
item.content:encoded: Pakistan has emerged as a key intermediary in the U.S-Israel war with Iran. It played this role before, during a high-stakes moment in diplomatic history.
item.dc:creator: Betsy Joles
